headline: Stryker Unveils TPX HD As Stock Trades Below Analyst Targets
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) has introduced TPX HD, a next-generation surgical power tool for demanding orthopedic procedures. The system is designed to offer higher torque, customizable control, and improved ergonomics for revision and minimally invasive surgeries. This launch adds a new product to Stryker's existing orthopedic portfolio and follows earlier product and cybersecurity updates. Stryker's new TPX HD system arrives as the stock trades at around $295.0, with the share price down 15.3%...
